scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n docker,tunnel,frontend,tsc,emulator -c blue,magenta,green,yellow,cyan "npm run dev:docker" "npm run dev:tunnel" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:functions" "npm run dev:emulator"
scripts.dev:frontend: if [ -d appfront-embedded ]; then cd appfront-embedded && npm run dev; else cd appfront && npm run dev; fi
